steps.title: Remove the grouping
steps.content:
Both groups are being added, so removing the parentheses does not change any signs. This keeps each term from the original expression in the same order.
$$6pt^2+5pt+8p^2t+4pt$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Only $5pt$ and $4pt$ are like terms, because they have the exact same variable part. The other two terms stay separate. $$5pt+4pt=9pt$$ $$6pt^2+8p^2t+9pt$$ The answer is D.
